Detailed Description

Macro Definition Documentation

◆ LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE (   x)

FEATURE - Feature Specification Number 0b0000000000000010..Controller only, with standard feature set 0b0000000000000011..Controller and target, with standard feature set

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MINOR [1/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MINOR (   x)

MINOR - Minor Version Number

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR [1/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR (   x)

MAJOR - Major Version Number

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO [1/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO (   x)

MTXFIFO - Controller Transmit FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO [1/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO (   x)

MRXFIFO - Controller Receive FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_MCR_MEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_MEN (   x)

MEN - Controller Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RST [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN (   x)

DOZEN - Doze Mode Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN (   x)

DBGEN - Debug Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RTF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset transmit FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RRF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset receive FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MSR_TDF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data requested

◆ LPI2C_MSR_RDF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Receive data not ready 0b1..Receive data ready

◆ LPI2C_MSR_EPF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_EPF (   x)

EPF - End Packet Flag 0b0..No Stop or repeated Start generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop or repeated Start generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_SDF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop condition generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop condition generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_NDF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_NDF (   x)

NDF - NACK Detect Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No unexpected NACK detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Unexpected NACK detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_ALF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_ALF (   x)

ALF - Arbitration Lost Flag 0b0..Controller did not lose arbitration 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Controller lost arbitration

◆ LPI2C_MSR_FEF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_MSR_PLTF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_PLTF (   x)

PLTF - Pin Low Timeout Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Pin low timeout did not occur 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Pin low timeout occurred

◆ LPI2C_MSR_DMF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_DMF (   x)

DMF - Data Match Flag 0b0..Matching data not received 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Matching data received

◆ LPI2C_MSR_STF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_STF (   x)

STF - Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Start condition not detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Start condition detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_MBF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_MBF (   x)

MBF - Controller Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MSR_BBF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MIER_TDIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_RDIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_EPIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_EPIE (   x)

EPIE - End Packet Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_SDIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_NDIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_NDIE (   x)

NDIE - NACK Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_ALIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_ALIE (   x)

ALIE - Arbitration Lost Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_FEIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE (   x)

PLTIE - Pin Low Timeout Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_DMIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_DMIE (   x)

DMIE - Data Match Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_STIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_STIE (   x)

STIE - Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_TDDE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_RDDE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN (   x)

HREN - Host Request Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL (   x)

HRPOL - Host Request Polarity 0b0..Active low 0b1..Active high

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL (   x)

HRSEL - Host Request Select 0b0..Host request input is pin HREQ 0b1..Host request input is input trigger

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR (   x)

HRDIR - Host Request Direction 0b0..HREQ pin is input (for LPI2C controller) 0b1..HREQ pin is output (for LPI2C target)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO (   x)

CIRFIFO - Circular FIFO Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO (   x)

RDMO - Receive Data Match Only 0b0..Received data is stored in the receive FIFO 0b1..Received data is discarded unless MSR[DMF] is set

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX (   x)

RELAX - Relaxed Mode 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Relaxed transfer

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT (   x)

ABORT - Abort Transfer 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Abort existing transfer and do not start a new one

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE (   x)

PRESCALE - Prescaler 0b000..Divide by 1 0b001..Divide by 2 0b010..Divide by 4 0b011..Divide by 8 0b100..Divide by 16 0b101..Divide by 32 0b110..Divide by 64 0b111..Divide by 128

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP (   x)

AUTOSTOP - Automatic Stop Generation 0b0..No effect 0b1..Stop automatically generated

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..No effect 0b1..Treat a received NACK as an ACK

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG (   x)

TIMECFG - Timeout Configuration 0b0..SCL 0b1..SCL or SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG (   x)

STOPCFG - Stop Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition 0b1..Last Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG (   x)

STARTCFG - Start Configuration 0b0..Sets when both I2C bus and LPI2C controller are idle 0b1..Sets when I2C bus is idle

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG (   x)

MATCFG - Match Configuration 0b000..Match is disabled 0b001..Reserved 0b010..Match is enabled: first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b011..Match is enabled: any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b100..Match is enabled: (first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (second data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b101..Match is enabled: (any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (next data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b110..Match is enabled: (first data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1]) 0b111..Match is enabled: (any data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1])

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG (   x)

PINCFG - Pin Configuration 0b000..Two-pin open drain mode 0b001..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) 0b010..Two-pin push-pull mode 0b011..Four-pin push-pull mode 0b100..Two-pin open-drain mode with separate LPI2C target 0b101..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) with separate LPI2C target 0b110..Two-pin push-pull mode with separate LPI2C target 0b111..Four-pin push-pull mode (inverted outputs)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE (   x)

BUSIDLE - Bus Idle Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL (   x)

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW (   x)

PINLOW - Pin Low Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 (   x)

MATCH0 - Match 0 Value

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 (   x)

MATCH1 - Match 1 Value

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKLO [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER (   x)

TXWATER - Transmit FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER (   x)

RXWATER - Receive FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT (   x)

TXCOUNT - Transmit FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT (   x)

RXCOUNT - Receive FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_DATA [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Transmit Data

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_CMD [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_CMD (   x)

CMD - Command Data 0b000..Transmit the value in DATA[7:0] 0b001..Receive (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b010..Generate Stop condition on I2C bus 0b011..Receive and discard (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b100..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] 0b101..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned) 0b110..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode 0b111..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned)

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_DATA [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY [1/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - RX Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_SEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_SEN (   x)

SEN - Target Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RST [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..Not reset 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN (   x)

FILTEN - Filter Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ (   x)

FILTDZ - Filter Doze Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RTF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..STDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RRF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..SRDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TDF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data is requested

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RDF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Not ready 0b1..Ready

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AVF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AVF (   x)

AVF - Address Valid Flag 0b0..Not valid 0b1..Valid

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TAF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TAF (   x)

TAF - Transmit ACK Flag 0b0..Not required 0b1..Required

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RSF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RSF (   x)

RSF - Repeated Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No repeated Start detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Repeated Start detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SDF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop detected 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BEF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BEF (   x)

BEF - Bit Error Flag 0b0..No bit error occurred 0b0..No effect 0b1..Bit error occurred 0b1..Clear the flag

◆ LPI2C_SSR_FEF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM0F [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM0F (   x)

AM0F - Address Match 0 Flag 0b0..ADDR0 matching address not received 0b1..ADDR0 matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM1F [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM1F (   x)

AM1F - Address Match 1 Flag 0b0..Matching address not received 0b1..Matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_GCF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_GCF (   x)

GCF - General Call Flag 0b0..General call address disabled or not detected 0b1..General call address detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SARF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SARF (   x)

SARF - SMBus Alert Response Flag 0b0..Disabled or not detected 0b1..Enabled and detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SBF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SBF (   x)

SBF - Target Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BBF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TDIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RDIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AVIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AVIE (   x)

AVIE - Address Valid Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TAIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TAIE (   x)

TAIE - Transmit ACK Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RSIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RSIE (   x)

RSIE - Repeated Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SDIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_BEIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_BEIE (   x)

BEIE - Bit Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

#define LPI2C_SIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE (   x)

AM0IE - Address Match 0 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE (   x)

AM1IE - Address Match 1 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_GCIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_GCIE (   x)

GCIE - General Call Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disabled 0b1..Enabled

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SARIE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SARIE (   x)

SARIE - SMBus Alert Response Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_TDDE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RDDE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable DMA request 0b1..Enable DMA request

◆ LPI2C_SDER_AVDE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_AVDE (   x)

AVDE - Address Valid DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RSDE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RSDE (   x)

RSDE - Repeated Start DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_SDDE [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_SDDE (   x)

SDDE - Stop Detect DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ (   x)

RDREQ - Read Request 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK (   x)

RDACK - Read Acknowledge Flag 0b0..Read Request not acknowledged 0b1..Read Request acknowledged

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL (   x)

ADRSTALL - Address SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL (   x)

RXSTALL - RX SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL (   x)

TXDSTALL - Transmit Data SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL (   x)

ACKSTALL - ACK SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK (   x)

RXNACK - Receive NACK 0b0..ACK or NACK always determined by STAR[TXNACK] 0b1..NACK always generated on address overrun or receive data overrun, otherwise ACK or NACK is determined by STAR[TXNACK]

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN (   x)

GCEN - General Call Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN (   x)

SAEN - SMBus Alert Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG (   x)

TXCFG - Transmit Flag Configuration 0b0..SSR[TDF] is set only during a target-transmit transfer when STDR is empty 0b1..SSR[TDF] is set whenever STDR is empty

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG (   x)

RXCFG - Receive Data Configuration 0b0..Return received data, clear SSR[RDF] 0b1..Return SASR and clear SSR[AVF] when SSR[AVF] is set, return received data and clear SSR[RDF] when SSR[AFV] is not set

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..End transfer on NACK 0b1..Do not end transfer on NACK

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN (   x)

HSMEN - HS Mode Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG (   x)

ADDRCFG - Address Configuration 0b000..Address match 0 (7-bit) 0b001..Address match 0 (10-bit) 0b010..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b011..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b100..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b101..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b110..From address match 0 (7-bit) to address match 1 (7-bit) 0b111..From address match 0 (10-bit) to address match 1 (10-bit)

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL (   x)

RXALL - Receive All 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG (   x)

RSCFG - Repeated Start Configuration 0b0..Any repeated Start condition following an address match 0b1..Any repeated Start condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG (   x)

SDCFG - Stop Detect Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition following an address match 0b1..Any Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD (   x)

CLKHOLD - Clock Hold Time

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSCL [1/4]

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

ADDR0 - Address 0 Value

◆ LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR1 [1/4]

ADDR1 - Address 1 Value

◆ LPI2C_SASR_RADDR [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SASR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SASR_ANV [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SASR_ANV (   x)

ANV - Address Not Valid 0b0..Valid 0b1..Not valid

◆ LPI2C_STAR_TXNACK [1/4]

#define LPI2C_STAR_TXNACK (   x)

TXNACK - Transmit NACK 0b0..Transmit ACK 0b1..Transmit NACK

#define LPI2C_STDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Transmit Data

DATA - Received Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_RADDR [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_RXEMPTY [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_SOF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_SOF (   x)

SOF - Start of Frame 0b0..Not first 0b1..First

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_DATA [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_RADDR [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_RXEMPTY [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_SOF [1/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_SOF (   x)

SOF - Start of Frame 0b0..Not the first 0b1..First

◆ LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE (   x)

FEATURE - Feature Specification Number 0b0000000000000010..Controller only, with standard feature set 0b0000000000000011..Controller and target, with standard feature set

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MINOR [2/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MINOR (   x)

MINOR - Minor Version Number

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR [2/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR (   x)

MAJOR - Major Version Number

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO [2/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO (   x)

MTXFIFO - Controller Transmit FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO [2/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO (   x)

MRXFIFO - Controller Receive FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_MCR_MEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_MEN (   x)

MEN - Controller Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RST [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN (   x)

DOZEN - Doze Mode Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN (   x)

DBGEN - Debug Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RTF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset transmit FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RRF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset receive FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MSR_TDF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data requested

◆ LPI2C_MSR_RDF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Receive data not ready 0b1..Receive data ready

◆ LPI2C_MSR_EPF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_EPF (   x)

EPF - End Packet Flag 0b0..No Stop or repeated Start generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop or repeated Start generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_SDF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop condition generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop condition generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_NDF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_NDF (   x)

NDF - NACK Detect Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No unexpected NACK detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Unexpected NACK detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_ALF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_ALF (   x)

ALF - Arbitration Lost Flag 0b0..Controller did not lose arbitration 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Controller lost arbitration

◆ LPI2C_MSR_FEF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_MSR_PLTF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_PLTF (   x)

PLTF - Pin Low Timeout Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Pin low timeout did not occur 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Pin low timeout occurred

◆ LPI2C_MSR_DMF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_DMF (   x)

DMF - Data Match Flag 0b0..Matching data not received 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Matching data received

◆ LPI2C_MSR_STF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_STF (   x)

STF - Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Start condition not detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Start condition detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_MBF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_MBF (   x)

MBF - Controller Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MSR_BBF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MIER_TDIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_RDIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_EPIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_EPIE (   x)

EPIE - End Packet Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_SDIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_NDIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_NDIE (   x)

NDIE - NACK Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_ALIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_ALIE (   x)

ALIE - Arbitration Lost Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_FEIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE (   x)

PLTIE - Pin Low Timeout Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_DMIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_DMIE (   x)

DMIE - Data Match Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_STIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_STIE (   x)

STIE - Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_TDDE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_RDDE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN (   x)

HREN - Host Request Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL (   x)

HRPOL - Host Request Polarity 0b0..Active low 0b1..Active high

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL (   x)

HRSEL - Host Request Select 0b0..Host request input is pin HREQ 0b1..Host request input is input trigger

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR (   x)

HRDIR - Host Request Direction 0b0..HREQ pin is input (for LPI2C controller) 0b1..HREQ pin is output (for LPI2C target)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO (   x)

CIRFIFO - Circular FIFO Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO (   x)

RDMO - Receive Data Match Only 0b0..Received data is stored in the receive FIFO 0b1..Received data is discarded unless MSR[DMF] is set

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX (   x)

RELAX - Relaxed Mode 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Relaxed transfer

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT (   x)

ABORT - Abort Transfer 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Abort existing transfer and do not start a new one

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE (   x)

PRESCALE - Prescaler 0b000..Divide by 1 0b001..Divide by 2 0b010..Divide by 4 0b011..Divide by 8 0b100..Divide by 16 0b101..Divide by 32 0b110..Divide by 64 0b111..Divide by 128

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP (   x)

AUTOSTOP - Automatic Stop Generation 0b0..No effect 0b1..Stop automatically generated

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..No effect 0b1..Treat a received NACK as an ACK

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG (   x)

TIMECFG - Timeout Configuration 0b0..SCL 0b1..SCL or SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG (   x)

STOPCFG - Stop Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition 0b1..Last Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG (   x)

STARTCFG - Start Configuration 0b0..Sets when both I2C bus and LPI2C controller are idle 0b1..Sets when I2C bus is idle

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG (   x)

MATCFG - Match Configuration 0b000..Match is disabled 0b001..Reserved 0b010..Match is enabled: first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b011..Match is enabled: any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b100..Match is enabled: (first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (second data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b101..Match is enabled: (any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (next data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b110..Match is enabled: (first data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1]) 0b111..Match is enabled: (any data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1])

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG (   x)

PINCFG - Pin Configuration 0b000..Two-pin open drain mode 0b001..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) 0b010..Two-pin push-pull mode 0b011..Four-pin push-pull mode 0b100..Two-pin open-drain mode with separate LPI2C target 0b101..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) with separate LPI2C target 0b110..Two-pin push-pull mode with separate LPI2C target 0b111..Four-pin push-pull mode (inverted outputs)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_FRCHS [1/3]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_FRCHS (   x)

FRCHS - Force HS Mode 0b0..No effect 0b1..LPI2C pin state forced into HS mode

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE (   x)

BUSIDLE - Bus Idle Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL (   x)

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW (   x)

PINLOW - Pin Low Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 (   x)

MATCH0 - Match 0 Value

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 (   x)

MATCH1 - Match 1 Value

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKLO [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER (   x)

TXWATER - Transmit FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER (   x)

RXWATER - Receive FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT (   x)

TXCOUNT - Transmit FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT (   x)

RXCOUNT - Receive FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_DATA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Transmit Data

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_CMD [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_CMD (   x)

CMD - Command Data 0b000..Transmit the value in DATA[7:0] 0b001..Receive (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b010..Generate Stop condition on I2C bus 0b011..Receive and discard (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b100..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] 0b101..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned) 0b110..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode 0b111..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned)

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_DATA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY [2/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - RX Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_SEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_SEN (   x)

SEN - Target Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RST [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..Not reset 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN (   x)

FILTEN - Filter Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ (   x)

FILTDZ - Filter Doze Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RTF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..STDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RRF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..SRDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TDF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data is requested

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RDF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Not ready 0b1..Ready

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AVF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AVF (   x)

AVF - Address Valid Flag 0b0..Not valid 0b1..Valid

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TAF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TAF (   x)

TAF - Transmit ACK Flag 0b0..Not required 0b1..Required

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RSF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RSF (   x)

RSF - Repeated Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No repeated Start detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Repeated Start detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SDF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop detected 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BEF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BEF (   x)

BEF - Bit Error Flag 0b0..No bit error occurred 0b0..No effect 0b1..Bit error occurred 0b1..Clear the flag

◆ LPI2C_SSR_FEF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM0F [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM0F (   x)

AM0F - Address Match 0 Flag 0b0..ADDR0 matching address not received 0b1..ADDR0 matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM1F [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM1F (   x)

AM1F - Address Match 1 Flag 0b0..Matching address not received 0b1..Matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_GCF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_GCF (   x)

GCF - General Call Flag 0b0..General call address disabled or not detected 0b1..General call address detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SARF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SARF (   x)

SARF - SMBus Alert Response Flag 0b0..Disabled or not detected 0b1..Enabled and detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SBF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SBF (   x)

SBF - Target Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BBF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TDIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RDIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AVIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AVIE (   x)

AVIE - Address Valid Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TAIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TAIE (   x)

TAIE - Transmit ACK Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RSIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RSIE (   x)

RSIE - Repeated Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SDIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_BEIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_BEIE (   x)

BEIE - Bit Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_FEIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE (   x)

AM0IE - Address Match 0 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE (   x)

AM1IE - Address Match 1 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_GCIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_GCIE (   x)

GCIE - General Call Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disabled 0b1..Enabled

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SARIE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SARIE (   x)

SARIE - SMBus Alert Response Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_TDDE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RDDE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable DMA request 0b1..Enable DMA request

◆ LPI2C_SDER_AVDE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_AVDE (   x)

AVDE - Address Valid DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RSDE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RSDE (   x)

RSDE - Repeated Start DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_SDDE [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_SDDE (   x)

SDDE - Stop Detect DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ (   x)

RDREQ - Read Request 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK (   x)

RDACK - Read Acknowledge Flag 0b0..Read Request not acknowledged 0b1..Read Request acknowledged

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL (   x)

ADRSTALL - Address SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL (   x)

RXSTALL - RX SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL (   x)

TXDSTALL - Transmit Data SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL (   x)

ACKSTALL - ACK SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK (   x)

RXNACK - Receive NACK 0b0..ACK or NACK always determined by STAR[TXNACK] 0b1..NACK always generated on address overrun or receive data overrun, otherwise ACK or NACK is determined by STAR[TXNACK]

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN (   x)

GCEN - General Call Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN (   x)

SAEN - SMBus Alert Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG (   x)

TXCFG - Transmit Flag Configuration 0b0..SSR[TDF] is set only during a target-transmit transfer when STDR is empty 0b1..SSR[TDF] is set whenever STDR is empty

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG (   x)

RXCFG - Receive Data Configuration 0b0..Return received data, clear SSR[RDF] 0b1..Return SASR and clear SSR[AVF] when SSR[AVF] is set, return received data and clear SSR[RDF] when SSR[AFV] is not set

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..End transfer on NACK 0b1..Do not end transfer on NACK

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN (   x)

HSMEN - HS Mode Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG (   x)

ADDRCFG - Address Configuration 0b000..Address match 0 (7-bit) 0b001..Address match 0 (10-bit) 0b010..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b011..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b100..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b101..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b110..From address match 0 (7-bit) to address match 1 (7-bit) 0b111..From address match 0 (10-bit) to address match 1 (10-bit)

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL (   x)

RXALL - Receive All 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG (   x)

RSCFG - Repeated Start Configuration 0b0..Any repeated Start condition following an address match 0b1..Any repeated Start condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG (   x)

SDCFG - Stop Detect Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition following an address match 0b1..Any Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD (   x)

CLKHOLD - Clock Hold Time

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSCL [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSCL (   x)

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

◆ LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR0 [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR0 (   x)

ADDR0 - Address 0 Value

◆ LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR1 [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR1 (   x)

ADDR1 - Address 1 Value

◆ LPI2C_SASR_RADDR [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SASR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SASR_ANV [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SASR_ANV (   x)

ANV - Address Not Valid 0b0..Valid 0b1..Not valid

◆ LPI2C_STAR_TXNACK [2/4]

#define LPI2C_STAR_TXNACK (   x)

TXNACK - Transmit NACK 0b0..Transmit ACK 0b1..Transmit NACK

◆ LPI2C_STDR_DATA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_STDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Transmit Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_DATA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Received Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_RADDR [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_RXEMPTY [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_SOF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_SOF (   x)

SOF - Start of Frame 0b0..Not first 0b1..First

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_DATA [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_RADDR [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_RXEMPTY [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_SOF [2/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_SOF (   x)

SOF - Start of Frame 0b0..Not the first 0b1..First

◆ LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE (   x)

FEATURE - Feature Specification Number 0b0000000000000010..Controller only, with standard feature set 0b0000000000000011..Controller and target, with standard feature set

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MINOR [3/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MINOR (   x)

MINOR - Minor Version Number

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR [3/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR (   x)

MAJOR - Major Version Number

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO [3/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO (   x)

MTXFIFO - Controller Transmit FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO [3/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO (   x)

MRXFIFO - Controller Receive FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_MCR_MEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_MEN (   x)

MEN - Controller Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RST [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN (   x)

DOZEN - Doze Mode Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN (   x)

DBGEN - Debug Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RTF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset transmit FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RRF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset receive FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MSR_TDF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data requested

◆ LPI2C_MSR_RDF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Receive data not ready 0b1..Receive data ready

◆ LPI2C_MSR_EPF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_EPF (   x)

EPF - End Packet Flag 0b0..No Stop or repeated Start generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop or repeated Start generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_SDF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop condition generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop condition generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_NDF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_NDF (   x)

NDF - NACK Detect Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No unexpected NACK detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Unexpected NACK detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_ALF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_ALF (   x)

ALF - Arbitration Lost Flag 0b0..Controller did not lose arbitration 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Controller lost arbitration

◆ LPI2C_MSR_FEF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_MSR_PLTF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_PLTF (   x)

PLTF - Pin Low Timeout Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Pin low timeout did not occur 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Pin low timeout occurred

◆ LPI2C_MSR_DMF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_DMF (   x)

DMF - Data Match Flag 0b0..Matching data not received 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Matching data received

◆ LPI2C_MSR_STF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_STF (   x)

STF - Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Start condition not detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Start condition detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_MBF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_MBF (   x)

MBF - Controller Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MSR_BBF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MIER_TDIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_RDIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_EPIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_EPIE (   x)

EPIE - End Packet Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_SDIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_NDIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_NDIE (   x)

NDIE - NACK Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_ALIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_ALIE (   x)

ALIE - Arbitration Lost Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_FEIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE (   x)

PLTIE - Pin Low Timeout Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_DMIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_DMIE (   x)

DMIE - Data Match Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_STIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_STIE (   x)

STIE - Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_TDDE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_RDDE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN (   x)

HREN - Host Request Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL (   x)

HRPOL - Host Request Polarity 0b0..Active low 0b1..Active high

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL (   x)

HRSEL - Host Request Select 0b0..Host request input is pin HREQ 0b1..Host request input is input trigger

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR (   x)

HRDIR - Host Request Direction 0b0..HREQ pin is input (for LPI2C controller) 0b1..HREQ pin is output (for LPI2C target)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO (   x)

CIRFIFO - Circular FIFO Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO (   x)

RDMO - Receive Data Match Only 0b0..Received data is stored in the receive FIFO 0b1..Received data is discarded unless MSR[DMF] is set

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX (   x)

RELAX - Relaxed Mode 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Relaxed transfer

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT (   x)

ABORT - Abort Transfer 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Abort existing transfer and do not start a new one

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE (   x)

PRESCALE - Prescaler 0b000..Divide by 1 0b001..Divide by 2 0b010..Divide by 4 0b011..Divide by 8 0b100..Divide by 16 0b101..Divide by 32 0b110..Divide by 64 0b111..Divide by 128

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP (   x)

AUTOSTOP - Automatic Stop Generation 0b0..No effect 0b1..Stop automatically generated

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..No effect 0b1..Treat a received NACK as an ACK

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG (   x)

TIMECFG - Timeout Configuration 0b0..SCL 0b1..SCL or SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG (   x)

STOPCFG - Stop Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition 0b1..Last Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG (   x)

STARTCFG - Start Configuration 0b0..Sets when both I2C bus and LPI2C controller are idle 0b1..Sets when I2C bus is idle

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG (   x)

MATCFG - Match Configuration 0b000..Match is disabled 0b001..Reserved 0b010..Match is enabled: first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b011..Match is enabled: any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b100..Match is enabled: (first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (second data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b101..Match is enabled: (any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (next data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b110..Match is enabled: (first data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1]) 0b111..Match is enabled: (any data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1])

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG (   x)

PINCFG - Pin Configuration 0b000..Two-pin open drain mode 0b001..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) 0b010..Two-pin push-pull mode 0b011..Four-pin push-pull mode 0b100..Two-pin open-drain mode with separate LPI2C target 0b101..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) with separate LPI2C target 0b110..Two-pin push-pull mode with separate LPI2C target 0b111..Four-pin push-pull mode (inverted outputs)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_FRCHS [2/3]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_FRCHS (   x)

FRCHS - Force HS Mode 0b0..No effect 0b1..LPI2C pin state forced into HS mode

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE (   x)

BUSIDLE - Bus Idle Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL (   x)

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW (   x)

PINLOW - Pin Low Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 (   x)

MATCH0 - Match 0 Value

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 (   x)

MATCH1 - Match 1 Value

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER (   x)

TXWATER - Transmit FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER (   x)

RXWATER - Receive FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT (   x)

TXCOUNT - Transmit FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT (   x)

RXCOUNT - Receive FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_DATA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Transmit Data

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_CMD [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_CMD (   x)

CMD - Command Data 0b000..Transmit the value in DATA[7:0] 0b001..Receive (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b010..Generate Stop condition on I2C bus 0b011..Receive and discard (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b100..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] 0b101..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned) 0b110..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode 0b111..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned)

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_DATA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY [3/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - RX Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_SEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_SEN (   x)

SEN - Target Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RST [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..Not reset 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN (   x)

FILTEN - Filter Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ (   x)

FILTDZ - Filter Doze Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RTF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..STDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RRF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..SRDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TDF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data is requested

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RDF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Not ready 0b1..Ready

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AVF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AVF (   x)

AVF - Address Valid Flag 0b0..Not valid 0b1..Valid

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TAF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TAF (   x)

TAF - Transmit ACK Flag 0b0..Not required 0b1..Required

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RSF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RSF (   x)

RSF - Repeated Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No repeated Start detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Repeated Start detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SDF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop detected 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BEF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BEF (   x)

BEF - Bit Error Flag 0b0..No bit error occurred 0b0..No effect 0b1..Bit error occurred 0b1..Clear the flag

◆ LPI2C_SSR_FEF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM0F [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM0F (   x)

AM0F - Address Match 0 Flag 0b0..ADDR0 matching address not received 0b1..ADDR0 matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM1F [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM1F (   x)

AM1F - Address Match 1 Flag 0b0..Matching address not received 0b1..Matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_GCF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_GCF (   x)

GCF - General Call Flag 0b0..General call address disabled or not detected 0b1..General call address detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SARF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SARF (   x)

SARF - SMBus Alert Response Flag 0b0..Disabled or not detected 0b1..Enabled and detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SBF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SBF (   x)

SBF - Target Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BBF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TDIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RDIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AVIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AVIE (   x)

AVIE - Address Valid Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TAIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TAIE (   x)

TAIE - Transmit ACK Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RSIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RSIE (   x)

RSIE - Repeated Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SDIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_BEIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_BEIE (   x)

BEIE - Bit Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_FEIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE (   x)

AM0IE - Address Match 0 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE (   x)

AM1IE - Address Match 1 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_GCIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_GCIE (   x)

GCIE - General Call Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disabled 0b1..Enabled

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SARIE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SARIE (   x)

SARIE - SMBus Alert Response Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_TDDE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RDDE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable DMA request 0b1..Enable DMA request

◆ LPI2C_SDER_AVDE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_AVDE (   x)

AVDE - Address Valid DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RSDE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RSDE (   x)

RSDE - Repeated Start DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_SDDE [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_SDDE (   x)

SDDE - Stop Detect DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ (   x)

RDREQ - Read Request 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK (   x)

RDACK - Read Acknowledge Flag 0b0..Read Request not acknowledged 0b1..Read Request acknowledged

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL (   x)

ADRSTALL - Address SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL (   x)

RXSTALL - RX SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL (   x)

TXDSTALL - Transmit Data SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL (   x)

ACKSTALL - ACK SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK (   x)

RXNACK - Receive NACK 0b0..ACK or NACK always determined by STAR[TXNACK] 0b1..NACK always generated on address overrun or receive data overrun, otherwise ACK or NACK is determined by STAR[TXNACK]

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN (   x)

GCEN - General Call Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN (   x)

SAEN - SMBus Alert Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG (   x)

TXCFG - Transmit Flag Configuration 0b0..SSR[TDF] is set only during a target-transmit transfer when STDR is empty 0b1..SSR[TDF] is set whenever STDR is empty

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG (   x)

RXCFG - Receive Data Configuration 0b0..Return received data, clear SSR[RDF] 0b1..Return SASR and clear SSR[AVF] when SSR[AVF] is set, return received data and clear SSR[RDF] when SSR[AFV] is not set

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..End transfer on NACK 0b1..Do not end transfer on NACK

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN (   x)

HSMEN - HS Mode Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG (   x)

ADDRCFG - Address Configuration 0b000..Address match 0 (7-bit) 0b001..Address match 0 (10-bit) 0b010..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b011..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b100..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b101..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b110..From address match 0 (7-bit) to address match 1 (7-bit) 0b111..From address match 0 (10-bit) to address match 1 (10-bit)

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL (   x)

RXALL - Receive All 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG (   x)

RSCFG - Repeated Start Configuration 0b0..Any repeated Start condition following an address match 0b1..Any repeated Start condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG (   x)

SDCFG - Stop Detect Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition following an address match 0b1..Any Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD (   x)

CLKHOLD - Clock Hold Time

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSCL [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSCL (   x)

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

◆ LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR0 [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR0 (   x)

ADDR0 - Address 0 Value

◆ LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR1 [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR1 (   x)

ADDR1 - Address 1 Value

◆ LPI2C_SASR_RADDR [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SASR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SASR_ANV [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SASR_ANV (   x)

ANV - Address Not Valid 0b0..Valid 0b1..Not valid

◆ LPI2C_STAR_TXNACK [3/4]

#define LPI2C_STAR_TXNACK (   x)

TXNACK - Transmit NACK 0b0..Transmit ACK 0b1..Transmit NACK

◆ LPI2C_STDR_DATA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_STDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Transmit Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_DATA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Received Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_RADDR [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_RXEMPTY [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SRDR_SOF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDR_SOF (   x)

SOF - Start of Frame 0b0..Not first 0b1..First

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_DATA [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_RADDR [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_RADDR (   x)

RADDR - Received Address

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_RXEMPTY [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SRDROR_SOF [3/4]

#define LPI2C_SRDROR_SOF (   x)

SOF - Start of Frame 0b0..Not the first 0b1..First

◆ LPI2C_MTCBR_DATA

#define LPI2C_MTCBR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Data

◆ LPI2C_MTCBR_CMD

#define LPI2C_MTCBR_CMD (   x)

CMD - Command

◆ LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA0

#define LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA0 (   x)

DATA0 - Data

◆ LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA1

#define LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA1 (   x)

DATA1 - Data

◆ LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA2

#define LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA2 (   x)

DATA2 - Data

◆ LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA3

#define LPI2C_MTDBR_DATA3 (   x)

DATA3 - Data

◆ LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_FEATURE (   x)

FEATURE - Feature Specification Number 0b0000000000000010..Controller only, with standard feature set 0b0000000000000011..Controller and target, with standard feature set

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MINOR [4/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MINOR (   x)

MINOR - Minor Version Number

◆ LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR [4/4]

#define LPI2C_VERID_MAJOR (   x)

MAJOR - Major Version Number

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO [4/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MTXFIFO (   x)

MTXFIFO - Controller Transmit FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO [4/4]

#define LPI2C_PARAM_MRXFIFO (   x)

MRXFIFO - Controller Receive FIFO Size

◆ LPI2C_MCR_MEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_MEN (   x)

MEN - Controller Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RST [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DOZEN (   x)

DOZEN - Doze Mode Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_DBGEN (   x)

DBGEN - Debug Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RTF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset transmit FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MCR_RRF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..Reset receive FIFO

◆ LPI2C_MSR_TDF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data requested

◆ LPI2C_MSR_RDF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Receive data not ready 0b1..Receive data ready

◆ LPI2C_MSR_EPF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_EPF (   x)

EPF - End Packet Flag 0b0..No Stop or repeated Start generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop or repeated Start generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_SDF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop condition generated 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop condition generated

◆ LPI2C_MSR_NDF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_NDF (   x)

NDF - NACK Detect Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No unexpected NACK detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Unexpected NACK detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_ALF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_ALF (   x)

ALF - Arbitration Lost Flag 0b0..Controller did not lose arbitration 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Controller lost arbitration

◆ LPI2C_MSR_FEF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_MSR_PLTF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_PLTF (   x)

PLTF - Pin Low Timeout Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Pin low timeout did not occur 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Pin low timeout occurred

◆ LPI2C_MSR_DMF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_DMF (   x)

DMF - Data Match Flag 0b0..Matching data not received 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Matching data received

◆ LPI2C_MSR_STF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_STF (   x)

STF - Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..Start condition not detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Start condition detected

◆ LPI2C_MSR_MBF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_MBF (   x)

MBF - Controller Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MSR_BBF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_MIER_TDIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_RDIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_EPIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_EPIE (   x)

EPIE - End Packet Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_SDIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_NDIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_NDIE (   x)

NDIE - NACK Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_ALIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_ALIE (   x)

ALIE - Arbitration Lost Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_FEIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_PLTIE (   x)

PLTIE - Pin Low Timeout Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_DMIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_DMIE (   x)

DMIE - Data Match Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MIER_STIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MIER_STIE (   x)

STIE - Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_TDDE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MDER_RDDE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HREN (   x)

HREN - Host Request Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRPOL (   x)

HRPOL - Host Request Polarity 0b0..Active low 0b1..Active high

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRSEL (   x)

HRSEL - Host Request Select 0b0..Host request input is pin HREQ 0b1..Host request input is input trigger

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_HRDIR (   x)

HRDIR - Host Request Direction 0b0..HREQ pin is input (for LPI2C controller) 0b1..HREQ pin is output (for LPI2C target)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_CIRFIFO (   x)

CIRFIFO - Circular FIFO Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RDMO (   x)

RDMO - Receive Data Match Only 0b0..Received data is stored in the receive FIFO 0b1..Received data is discarded unless MSR[DMF] is set

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_RELAX (   x)

RELAX - Relaxed Mode 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Relaxed transfer

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR0_ABORT (   x)

ABORT - Abort Transfer 0b0..Normal transfer 0b1..Abort existing transfer and do not start a new one

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PRESCALE (   x)

PRESCALE - Prescaler 0b000..Divide by 1 0b001..Divide by 2 0b010..Divide by 4 0b011..Divide by 8 0b100..Divide by 16 0b101..Divide by 32 0b110..Divide by 64 0b111..Divide by 128

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_AUTOSTOP (   x)

AUTOSTOP - Automatic Stop Generation 0b0..No effect 0b1..Stop automatically generated

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..No effect 0b1..Treat a received NACK as an ACK

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_TIMECFG (   x)

TIMECFG - Timeout Configuration 0b0..SCL 0b1..SCL or SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STOPCFG (   x)

STOPCFG - Stop Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition 0b1..Last Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_STARTCFG (   x)

STARTCFG - Start Configuration 0b0..Sets when both I2C bus and LPI2C controller are idle 0b1..Sets when I2C bus is idle

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_MATCFG (   x)

MATCFG - Match Configuration 0b000..Match is disabled 0b001..Reserved 0b010..Match is enabled: first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b011..Match is enabled: any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0] OR MDMR[MATCH1] 0b100..Match is enabled: (first data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (second data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b101..Match is enabled: (any data word equals MDMR[MATCH0]) AND (next data word equals MDMR[MATCH1) 0b110..Match is enabled: (first data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1]) 0b111..Match is enabled: (any data word AND MDMR[MATCH1]) equals (MDMR[MATCH0] AND MDMR[MATCH1])

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_PINCFG (   x)

PINCFG - Pin Configuration 0b000..Two-pin open drain mode 0b001..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) 0b010..Two-pin push-pull mode 0b011..Four-pin push-pull mode 0b100..Two-pin open-drain mode with separate LPI2C target 0b101..Two-pin output only mode (Ultra-Fast mode) with separate LPI2C target 0b110..Two-pin push-pull mode with separate LPI2C target 0b111..Four-pin push-pull mode (inverted outputs)

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR1_FRCHS [3/3]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR1_FRCHS (   x)

FRCHS - Force HS Mode 0b0..No effect 0b1..LPI2C pin state forced into HS mode

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_BUSIDLE (   x)

BUSIDLE - Bus Idle Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSCL (   x)

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

◆ LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCFGR3_PINLOW (   x)

PINLOW - Pin Low Timeout

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH0 (   x)

MATCH0 - Match 0 Value

◆ LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MDMR_MATCH1 (   x)

MATCH1 - Match 1 Value

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKLO [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR0_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKLO (   x)

CLKLO - Clock Low Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_CLKHI (   x)

CLKHI - Clock High Period

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_SETHOLD (   x)

SETHOLD - Setup Hold Delay

◆ LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MCCR1_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_TXWATER (   x)

TXWATER - Transmit FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MFCR_RXWATER (   x)

RXWATER - Receive FIFO Watermark

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_TXCOUNT (   x)

TXCOUNT - Transmit FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MFSR_RXCOUNT (   x)

RXCOUNT - Receive FIFO Count

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_DATA [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Transmit Data

◆ LPI2C_MTDR_CMD [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MTDR_CMD (   x)

CMD - Command Data 0b000..Transmit the value in DATA[7:0] 0b001..Receive (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b010..Generate Stop condition on I2C bus 0b011..Receive and discard (DATA[7:0] + 1) bytes 0b100..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] 0b101..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned) 0b110..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode 0b111..Generate (repeated) Start on the I2C bus and transmit the address in DATA[7:0] using HS mode (this transfer expects a NACK to be returned)

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_DATA [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - Receive Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_DATA (   x)

DATA - Receive Data

◆ LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY [4/4]

#define LPI2C_MRDROR_RXEMPTY (   x)

RXEMPTY - RX Empty 0b0..Not empty 0b1..Empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_SEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_SEN (   x)

SEN - Target Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RST [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RST (   x)

RST - Software Reset 0b0..Not reset 0b1..Reset

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTEN (   x)

FILTEN - Filter Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_FILTDZ (   x)

FILTDZ - Filter Doze Enable 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RTF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RTF (   x)

RTF - Reset Transmit FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..STDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SCR_RRF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCR_RRF (   x)

RRF - Reset Receive FIFO 0b0..No effect 0b1..SRDR is now empty

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TDF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TDF (   x)

TDF - Transmit Data Flag 0b0..Transmit data not requested 0b1..Transmit data is requested

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RDF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RDF (   x)

RDF - Receive Data Flag 0b0..Not ready 0b1..Ready

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AVF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AVF (   x)

AVF - Address Valid Flag 0b0..Not valid 0b1..Valid

◆ LPI2C_SSR_TAF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_TAF (   x)

TAF - Transmit ACK Flag 0b0..Not required 0b1..Required

◆ LPI2C_SSR_RSF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_RSF (   x)

RSF - Repeated Start Flag 0b0..No effect 0b0..No repeated Start detected 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Repeated Start detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SDF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SDF (   x)

SDF - Stop Detect Flag 0b0..No Stop detected 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..Stop detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BEF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BEF (   x)

BEF - Bit Error Flag 0b0..No bit error occurred 0b0..No effect 0b1..Bit error occurred 0b1..Clear the flag

◆ LPI2C_SSR_FEF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_FEF (   x)

FEF - FIFO Error Flag 0b0..No FIFO error 0b0..No effect 0b1..Clear the flag 0b1..FIFO error

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM0F [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM0F (   x)

AM0F - Address Match 0 Flag 0b0..ADDR0 matching address not received 0b1..ADDR0 matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_AM1F [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_AM1F (   x)

AM1F - Address Match 1 Flag 0b0..Matching address not received 0b1..Matching address received

◆ LPI2C_SSR_GCF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_GCF (   x)

GCF - General Call Flag 0b0..General call address disabled or not detected 0b1..General call address detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SARF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SARF (   x)

SARF - SMBus Alert Response Flag 0b0..Disabled or not detected 0b1..Enabled and detected

◆ LPI2C_SSR_SBF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_SBF (   x)

SBF - Target Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SSR_BBF [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SSR_BBF (   x)

BBF - Bus Busy Flag 0b0..Idle 0b1..Busy

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TDIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TDIE (   x)

TDIE - Transmit Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RDIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RDIE (   x)

RDIE - Receive Data Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AVIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AVIE (   x)

AVIE - Address Valid Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_TAIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_TAIE (   x)

TAIE - Transmit ACK Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_RSIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_RSIE (   x)

RSIE - Repeated Start Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SDIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SDIE (   x)

SDIE - Stop Detect Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_BEIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_BEIE (   x)

BEIE - Bit Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_FEIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_FEIE (   x)

FEIE - FIFO Error Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM0IE (   x)

AM0IE - Address Match 0 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_AM1IE (   x)

AM1IE - Address Match 1 Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SIER_GCIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_GCIE (   x)

GCIE - General Call Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disabled 0b1..Enabled

◆ LPI2C_SIER_SARIE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SIER_SARIE (   x)

SARIE - SMBus Alert Response Interrupt Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_TDDE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_TDDE (   x)

TDDE - Transmit Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RDDE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RDDE (   x)

RDDE - Receive Data DMA Enable 0b0..Disable DMA request 0b1..Enable DMA request

◆ LPI2C_SDER_AVDE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_AVDE (   x)

AVDE - Address Valid DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_RSDE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_RSDE (   x)

RSDE - Repeated Start DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SDER_SDDE [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SDER_SDDE (   x)

SDDE - Stop Detect DMA Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDREQ (   x)

RDREQ - Read Request 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR0_RDACK (   x)

RDACK - Read Acknowledge Flag 0b0..Read Request not acknowledged 0b1..Read Request acknowledged

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADRSTALL (   x)

ADRSTALL - Address SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXSTALL (   x)

RXSTALL - RX SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXDSTALL (   x)

TXDSTALL - Transmit Data SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ACKSTALL (   x)

ACKSTALL - ACK SCL Stall 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXNACK (   x)

RXNACK - Receive NACK 0b0..ACK or NACK always determined by STAR[TXNACK] 0b1..NACK always generated on address overrun or receive data overrun, otherwise ACK or NACK is determined by STAR[TXNACK]

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_GCEN (   x)

GCEN - General Call Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SAEN (   x)

SAEN - SMBus Alert Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_TXCFG (   x)

TXCFG - Transmit Flag Configuration 0b0..SSR[TDF] is set only during a target-transmit transfer when STDR is empty 0b1..SSR[TDF] is set whenever STDR is empty

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXCFG (   x)

RXCFG - Receive Data Configuration 0b0..Return received data, clear SSR[RDF] 0b1..Return SASR and clear SSR[AVF] when SSR[AVF] is set, return received data and clear SSR[RDF] when SSR[AFV] is not set

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_IGNACK (   x)

IGNACK - Ignore NACK 0b0..End transfer on NACK 0b1..Do not end transfer on NACK

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_HSMEN (   x)

HSMEN - HS Mode Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_ADDRCFG (   x)

ADDRCFG - Address Configuration 0b000..Address match 0 (7-bit) 0b001..Address match 0 (10-bit) 0b010..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b011..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b100..Address match 0 (7-bit) or address match 1 (10-bit) 0b101..Address match 0 (10-bit) or address match 1 (7-bit) 0b110..From address match 0 (7-bit) to address match 1 (7-bit) 0b111..From address match 0 (10-bit) to address match 1 (10-bit)

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RXALL (   x)

RXALL - Receive All 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_RSCFG (   x)

RSCFG - Repeated Start Configuration 0b0..Any repeated Start condition following an address match 0b1..Any repeated Start condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR1_SDCFG (   x)

SDCFG - Stop Detect Configuration 0b0..Any Stop condition following an address match 0b1..Any Stop condition

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_CLKHOLD (   x)

CLKHOLD - Clock Hold Time

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_DATAVD (   x)

DATAVD - Data Valid Delay

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSCL [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSCL (   x)

FILTSCL - Glitch Filter SCL

◆ LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA [4/4]

#define LPI2C_SCFGR2_FILTSDA (   x)

FILTSDA - Glitch Filter SDA

◆ LPI2C_SAMR_ADDR0 [4/4]

ADDR0 - Address 0 Value
